recap: Deleted rule-current-script-var.zsh, its unit tests, and removed both registrations from bats-lint-custom.zsh.
Migrated 56 direct-invocation files: removed CURRENT= from setup(), inlined script name into bats_run_zsh single-string calls, deleted two empty setup() blocks.
Migrated 4 source-prefix files: renamed CURRENT to sourcePrefix with 'source ...' value, updated all call sites to use $sourcePrefix && or $sourcePrefix.

Migrated all 6 temp-file-wrapper files: removed CURRENT= and caller.zsh printf from setup(), inlined function calls into bats_run_zsh single-string args; path.bats kept local script= per spec for complex multi-statement tests; solkan+wav2txt required adding export MOCK_OVERRIDE since they lack bats_mock calls.
